mapper.insert: INSERT INTO promotion (name, start_time, end_time, scope_type, applicable_category, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{scopeType}, #{applicableCategory}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE promotion SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE promotion SET name = #{name}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, scope_type = #{scopeType}, applicable_category = #{applicableCategory}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM promotion WHERE status = 1 AND start_time <= #{now} AND end_time >= #{now} AND (scope_type = 1 OR (scope_type = 2 AND applicable_category = #{categoryId})) ORDER BY scope_type DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
